goal: 收窄 preflight branch_drift，避免正常 feature branch ahead main 时提示 review upstream

summary.title: Quiet preflight branch drift for normal feature branches
summary.what: Preflight now reports branch_drift only when synced main contains commits that local HEAD does not contain, instead of warning whenever a feature branch is merely ahead of main. The human message and recommendation now describe reviewing or rebasing only if synced-main changes affect the work.
summary.why: A normal feature branch with its own commits should not imply upstream drift or ask the user to review synced main before committing or sealing.
summary.user_goal: 切个新分支，按你想的修吧，修完提个 PR

decisions.chose: Use the existing local..synced-main upstream commit set as the branch_drift condition.
decisions.rationale: That set is empty for ahead-only feature branches and non-empty when local is behind or diverged from synced main.

decisions.chose: Keep the existing branch_drift code and only change its trigger and text.
decisions.rationale: JSON consumers keep the same finding code while the UX becomes less noisy.

decisions.chose: Leave merge-base commit diff and worktree file collection unchanged.
decisions.rationale: Normal feature branch files still need to feed proposed/upstream overlap checks even when branch_drift is quiet.

acknowledged_constraints.note: Preflight remains a read-only readiness check; this change only adjusts classification text and conditions.
CurrentFiles still comes from local merge-base diff plus worktree state, and upstream-only files are not added as current work.

review_notes: Regression test covers an ahead-only feature branch: no branch_drift finding, level ok, but feature.go remains in CommitDiffFiles and CurrentFiles.
Temporary-repo dogfood confirmed ahead-only preflight is ok, then synced-main changes restore branch_drift and active_intent_base_behind.

architectural_claims: Preflight distinguishes ahead-only feature branch work from synced-main changes missing locally.
Preflight continues to compute current work from local commit diff and worktree status for overlap detection.
behavioral_changes: A normal feature branch ahead of synced main no longer emits branch_drift.
Branches behind or diverged from synced main still emit branch_drift because local..main has upstream commits.
The branch_drift recommendation now says to rebase or merge only if synced-main changes affect the work.
